text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sorry. That was rude of me. You see...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I always brush my tail before bed, but I just
couldn't get it right last night.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
By the time I was satisfied with the results, it was
long past my scheduled bedtime.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems Eishin Flash didn't get much rest...
